languages.text: {n}Вы вступаете в перестрелку с немногочисленной охраной. Однако из глубины двора уже спешит подкрепление. Себериан с хриплым криком бросается на вас, пытаясь заслонить собой сенешаля. Но меткий выстрел пробивает его ярко-синий глаз.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы вступаете в перестрелку с немногочисленной охраной. Однако из глубины двора уже спешит подкрепление. Себериан с хриплым криком бросается на вас, пытаясь заслонить собой сенешаля. Но меткий выстрел пробивает его ярко-синий глаз.{/n}

languages.text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы вступаете в перестрелку с немногочисленной охраной. Однако из глубины двора уже спешит подкрепление. Себериан с хриплым криком бросается на вас, пытаясь заслонить собой сенешаля. Но меткий выстрел пробивает его ярко-синий глаз.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

{n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

{n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du lieferst dir ein Scharmützel mit einigen Wachen, während aus dem hinteren Teil des Platzes bereits Verstärkung heranstürmt. Seberian stürzt sich mit einem heiseren Schrei auf dich, um die Truchsessin mit seinem Körper abzuschirmen. Aber ein gut gezielter Schuss durchbohrt sein strahlend blaues Auge.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Du lieferst dir ein Scharmützel mit einigen Wachen, während aus dem hinteren Teil des Platzes bereits Verstärkung heranstürmt. Seberian stürzt sich mit einem heiseren Schrei auf dich, um die Truchsessin mit seinem Körper abzuschirmen. Aber ein gut gezielter Schuss durchbohrt sein strahlend blaues Auge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你与一小队守卫交火，而此时增援正从庭院后方大批涌入。塞贝里安嘶吼着向你扑来，试图用身体护住总领。但一发精准的子弹射穿了他那只湛蓝的眼睛。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你与一小队守卫交火，而此时增援正从庭院后方大批涌入。塞贝里安嘶吼着向你扑来，试图用身体护住总领。但一发精准的子弹射穿了他那只湛蓝的眼睛。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un échange de tirs s'ensuit avec un petit contingent de gardes, mais les renforts affluent déjà à l'arrière de la cour. Seberian se jette sur vous en poussant un cri rauque, tentant de faire rempart de son corps pour protéger la sénéchale, mais un tir bien placé transperce son œil bleu vif.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un échange de tirs s'ensuit avec un petit contingent de gardes, mais les renforts affluent déjà à l'arrière de la cour. Seberian se jette sur vous en poussant un cri rauque, tentant de faire rempart de son corps pour protéger la sénéchale, mais un tir bien placé transperce son œil bleu vif.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Intercambias disparos con el pequeño contingente de guardias mientras ves llegar refuerzos desde el fondo del patio. Seberian te acomete con un ronco bramido, tratando de proteger a la senescal con su propio cuerpo. Pero un disparo certero atraviesa su brillante ojo azul.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Intercambias disparos con el pequeño contingente de guardias mientras ves llegar refuerzos desde el fondo del patio. Seberian te acomete con un ronco bramido, tratando de proteger a la senescal con su propio cuerpo. Pero un disparo certero atraviesa su brillante ojo azul.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sen küçük muhafız birliğiyle ateş açarken avlunun arka tarafından takviyeler akın etmeye başlıyor. Seberian, Seneşal'i bedeniyle korumaya çalışarak kısık bir çığlıkla üzerine atılıyor. Ancak iyi nişan alınmış bir atış, parlak mavi gözünü delip geçiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sen küçük muhafız birliğiyle ateş açarken avlunun arka tarafından takviyeler akın etmeye başlıyor. Seberian, Seneşal'i bedeniyle korumaya çalışarak kısık bir çığlıkla üzerine atılıyor. Ancak iyi nişan alınmış bir atış, parlak mavi gözünü delip geçiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}庭の奥から援軍が押し寄せているにもかかわらず、わずかな数の警備兵と銃撃戦を繰り広げる。セベリアンは嗄れた声で叫びながら、あなたに向かって突進して、執事の身を盾にする。しかし、狙いを定めた一発が彼の鮮やかな青い目を貫いた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You exchange fire with the small complement of guards, even as reinforcements are already pouring in from the back of the courtyard. Seberian lunges at you with a hoarse shout, trying to shield the Seneschal with his body. But a well-aimed shot pierces his bright blue eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}庭の奥から援軍が押し寄せているにもかかわらず、わずかな数の警備兵と銃撃戦を繰り広げる。セベリアンは嗄れた声で叫びながら、あなたに向かって突進して、執事の身を盾にする。しかし、狙いを定めた一発が彼の鮮やかな青い目を貫いた。{/n}
